expected_behavior: Low-risk, comfort-oriented cruising with only light braking.
Safety-dominant braking should emerge while avoiding collision.
Strong lateral correction should dominate without leaving the lane.
Road degradation should raise risk and moderate throttle usage.
Competing objectives should produce both notable braking and steering activity.
The controller should remain stable at low speed and come close to a stop if needed.
Open-road comfort bias should keep throttle healthy and braking light.
